name: Pumpkin Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, oats, baking soda, pumpkin pie spice, baking powder, and salt.
2. In another large bowl or mixer bowl, beat together egg beaters, pumpkin, sugars, water, oil, and evaporated milk until well combined.
3. Add the flour mixture to the pumpkin mixture on low speed, stirring until just blended.
4. Stir in the chopped walnuts.
5. Spoon the batter into two greased 9x5x3 inch loaf pans.
6. Bake at 350°F for 65 - 70 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow to cool in the pans for 10 minutes, then remove and transfer to wire racks to cool completely.
